engineGuide.h2: Nissan Cefiro Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Nissan Cefiro across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: Base single-cam RB engine. Reliable but underpowered for the Cefiro's weight; favoured for budget replacements.
compatibleVariants: A31 XE, A31 Base, A31 Standard Trim
commonFailures: Coil pack failure causing misfires on individual cylinders (60k-100k miles)
Head gasket failure following overheating events
Timing belt tensioner wear requiring preventative replacement
entries.cta: Get quotes for RB20E Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: Twin-cam non-turbo upgrade. Balanced reliability and performance; most common A31 replacement engine.
compatibleVariants: A31 SE, A31 Super Saloon, A31 Touring
commonFailures: Ignition coil pack failure (random cylinder misfire, 70k-110k miles)
CAM position sensor failure causing no-start conditions
Oil leak from valve cover gaskets at higher mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for RB20DE Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: Turbocharged flagship of A31 range. Highly tunable but ceramic turbo wheel prone to failure under hard use.
compatibleVariants: A31 Turbo, A31 GT, A31 Sport Trim
commonFailures: Ceramic turbo wheel disintegration (upgrade to steel wheel recommended)
Coil pack failure causing boost-related misfires (60k-90k miles)
Intercooler piping cracks leading to boost loss
entries.cta: Get quotes for RB20DET Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.5L Petrol
entries.history: Larger displacement RB for smoother power delivery. Popular swap target for A31 owners seeking more torque.
commonFailures: Timing belt tensioner failure requiring full belt service (80k-120k miles)
Oil consumption from worn valve stem seals
Crank angle sensor failure causing intermittent stalling
entries.cta: Get quotes for RB25DE Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.5L Petrol
entries.history: Low-emission NEO head update. Improved torque curve and fuel economy; sought-after for cleaner swaps.
compatibleVariants: Late A31 export models, A32 swap applications
commonFailures: VVT solenoid clogging causing rough idle
Coil pack failure on high-mileage units
ECU compatibility issues when swapped into earlier chassis
entries.cta: Get quotes for RB25DE NEO Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.6L Petrol
entries.history: Skyline GT-R legend. Rare in Cefiro but highly prized for drift builds; requires custom mounting and wiring.
compatibleVariants: A31 drift builds, enthusiast project cars
commonFailures: Oil pump drive gear failure on high-boost applications
Turbo bearing wear from extended hard use
Cooling system inadequacy leading to overheating
entries.cta: Get quotes for RB26DETT Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: Entry-level VQ V6 for A32. Smooth and refined but timing chain guide wear is a known high-mileage issue.
compatibleVariants: A32 XE, A32 Base Trim, A32 Standard
commonFailures: Timing chain guide plastic failure causing rattle (90k-130k miles)
Water pump leakage leading to overheating
Intake manifold gasket deterioration at higher mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for VQ20DE Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.5L Petrol
entries.history: Mid-range VQ offering balanced performance. Oil consumption from piston rings is the dominant failure pattern.
compatibleVariants: A32 SE, A32 S, A32 Touring
commonFailures: Excessive oil consumption from worn piston rings (80k-120k miles)
Timing chain tensioner wear causing startup rattle
Valve cover gasket oil leaks onto exhaust manifolds
entries.cta: Get quotes for VQ25DE Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.5L Petrol
entries.history: Direct injection VQ variant. Higher power output but injector and carbon buildup issues affect reliability.
compatibleVariants: A32 Gran Turismo, select high-spec export models
commonFailures: Direct injector clogging causing rough idle and misfires
Carbon buildup on intake valves requiring walnut blasting
High-pressure fuel pump wear at higher mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for VQ25DD Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 3.0L Petrol
entries.history: Top-spec VQ for luxury A32 trims. Powerful and smooth but timing chain tensioner failure can cause catastrophic damage.
compatibleVariants: A32 Excimo, A32 Gran Turismo, A32 Luxury Trim
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure causing chain skip (100k-140k miles)
Oil consumption from valve stem seal wear
Coolant leakage from thermostat housing gasket
entries.cta: Get quotes for VQ30DE Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

entries.title: 3.5L Petrol
entries.history: Later 3.5L VQ from Maxima/350Z. Popular swap for A32 owners seeking more power; requires ECU and wiring adaptation.
compatibleVariants: A32 performance builds, enthusiast project cars
commonFailures: Oil gallery gasket failure causing low oil pressure
Timing chain guide wear on high-mileage units
Intake plenum gasket leaks leading to vacuum issues
entries.cta: Get quotes for VQ35DE Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Nissan Cefiro Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Nissan Cefiro's RB and VQ engines are robust when maintained, but coil pack failure (RB20), turbo ceramic wheel failure (RB20DET), and timing chain guide wear (VQ series) dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: RB20 Coil Pack Failure - Why Nissan Cefiro Engines Misfire Under Load
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Cefiro A31 XE, SE, Turbo (1988-1994, RB20E, RB20DE, RB20DET)
problems.rootCause: Individual ignition coil packs degrade internally, causing intermittent misfires that worsen under boost or load.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Coil Pack Replacement - Replace faulty coil(s) only
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnostic testing, replace failed coil pack(s), clear codes
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix if other coils are aged; may recur within 12-24 months

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Full Coil Set + Plugs - Preventative full set
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all coil packs and spark plugs, inspect wiring loom
repairOptions.longevity: More reliable long-term; addresses age-related wear across all cylinders

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt RB20 Engine - Catastrophic misfire damage
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded coils, bench tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if engine has suffered detonation damage or high mileage

problems.recommendation: If misfires are isolated to one cylinder and compression is good, a full coil set replacement offers excellent value. However, if the engine has suffered prolonged misfiring with detonation, a rebuilt RB20 with upgraded ignition components is the safer long-term investment.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt RB20 engine prices for your Nissan Cefiro

problems.h4: RB20DET Turbo Failure - Ceramic Wheel Disintegration Under Boost
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Cefiro A31 Turbo, GT (1988-1994, RB20DET)
problems.rootCause: Factory ceramic turbo compressor wheel is brittle; hard driving or oil starvation causes wheel fragmentation.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Turbo Rebuild Kit - Replace bearings/seals only
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove turbo, replace bearings and seals, rebalance (if wheel intact)
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if ceramic wheel is undamaged; high risk of repeat failure

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Steel Wheel Turbo Upgrade - Replace with upgraded unit
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Fit aftermarket turbo with steel compressor wheel, upgrade oil lines
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended upgrade; eliminates ceramic failure risk, supports higher boost

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt RB20DET Engine - Catastrophic turbo failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt RB20DET with steel-wheel turbo, upgraded internals, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best option if turbo fragments entered engine causing piston/valve damage

problems.recommendation: Never rebuild a failed ceramic turbo - fragments will have damaged the engine. If compression is good, fit a steel-wheel turbo upgrade. If engine damage is confirmed, a rebuilt RB20DET with upgraded turbo is the most cost-effective path.
problems.cta: Get quotes for RB20DET Nissan Cefiro engine replacement with steel turbo

problems.h4: VQ Timing Chain Guide Failure - Why A32 Cefiros Develop Startup Rattle
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Cefiro A32 XE, SE, Excimo (1994-2003, VQ20DE, VQ25DE, VQ30DE)
problems.rootCause: Plastic timing chain guides become brittle with age and heat; fragments cause chain slack and potential valve timing loss.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Chain Tensioner Only - Temporary pressure fix
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace hydraulic tensioner to take up chain slack
repairOptions.longevity: Short-term solution; does not address worn guides; rattle likely to return

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Full Timing Service - Replace guides, chain, tensioner
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove front cover, replace all timing components, reset timing
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended preventative service if rattle is early-stage; restores reliability

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt VQ Engine - Catastrophic timing failure
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt VQ engine with upgraded timing components, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if chain skip caused valve/piston contact; includes upgraded guides

problems.recommendation: At first sign of startup rattle, budget for a full timing service. If the engine has suffered timing skip with valve contact, a rebuilt VQ with upgraded timing components is the only reliable solution.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt VQ engine prices for your Nissan Cefiro A32

problems.h4: VQ25DE Oil Consumption - Piston Ring Wear on High-Mileage A32 Cefiros
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Cefiro A32 SE, S, Touring (1994-2003, VQ25DE)
problems.rootCause: Piston ring lands wear, allowing oil to pass into combustion chambers; exacerbated by infrequent oil changes.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - PCV Valve + Seal Replacement - Address external leaks only
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve cover gaskets, inspect for external leaks
repairOptions.longevity: Does not address internal oil consumption; only reduces visible leaks

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Top-End Rebuild - Replace valve seals, decarbonise
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder heads, replace valve stem seals, clean carbon deposits
repairOptions.longevity: May reduce consumption if valve seals are primary cause; rings unchanged

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt VQ25DE Engine - Address ring wear
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded piston rings, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Only permanent solution for ring-land wear; eliminates consumption issue

problems.recommendation: If oil consumption exceeds 1 litre per 1,000 miles and compression is low, internal ring wear is confirmed. A rebuilt VQ25DE with upgraded rings is the most reliable and cost-effective long-term fix.
problems.cta: Get quotes for VQ25DE Nissan Cefiro engine replacement with upgraded rings

problems.h4: RB20 Overheating & Head Gasket Failure - Cooling System Neglect Consequences
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Cefiro A31 all variants (1988-1994, RB20E, RB20DE, RB20DET)
problems.typicalFailureMileage: Any mileage if cooling system neglected
problems.rootCause: Radiator, water pump or thermostat failure leads to overheating; aluminium head warps, gasket fails.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Cooling System Service - Preventative maintenance
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace radiator, water pump, thermostat, flush system, pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Essential preventative service; prevents overheating if done before failure

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Head Gasket Replacement - Repair warped head
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove head, machine flat, replace gasket, reassemble, test compression
repairOptions.longevity: Viable if block is undamaged and warpage is within machining limits

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt RB20 Engine - Catastrophic overheating damage
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded cooling components, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended if block is cracked, head is severely warped, or compression is lost

problems.recommendation: Never ignore overheating. If the engine has overheated severely, assume head gasket failure and check compression. A rebuilt RB20 with upgraded cooling components is often better value than a head gasket repair on a high-mileage engine.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt RB20 engine prices for your Nissan Cefiro with cooling upgrade

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan Cefiro
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're dealing with RB20 coil packs, RB20DET turbo failure, or VQ timing chain wear, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Nissan Cefiro specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Nationwide delivery and supply & fit options available.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan Cefiro Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan Cefiro and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Nissan Cefiro Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Nissan Cefiro is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Nissan Cefiro 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.0L displacement powered both A31 and A32 generations, with RB20 series straight-six engines in the RWD A31 and VQ20DE V6 in the FWD-based A32. These engines balance affordability and parts availability, making them popular choices for budget-conscious replacements.
commonFailurePoints: Coil pack failure on RB20 units; timing chain guide wear on VQ20DE
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Cefiro 2.0L petrol engines

items.title: Nissan Cefiro 2.5L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.5L option appears as the RB25DE straight-six in late A31 models and the VQ25DE/VQ25DD V6 across the A32 range. Offering a meaningful power increase over 2.0L units, these engines are favoured for performance-oriented replacements and drift builds.
commonFailurePoints: Timing belt tensioner wear on RB25; oil consumption on VQ25DE
items.cta: Compare Nissan Cefiro 2.5L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Cefiro 3.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.0L VQ30DE V6 was reserved for top-spec A32 trims like the Excimo and Gran Turismo, delivering smooth power and refined cruising. While less common than 2.0L and 2.5L units, replacement demand is significant due to timing chain tensioner failures on high-mileage examples.
commonFailurePoints: Timing chain tensioner failure; oil consumption from valve seals
items.cta: Compare Nissan Cefiro 3.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Cefiro 2.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.6L RB26DETT is not factory-fitted to any UK-market Cefiro but is a highly sought-after swap engine for A31 drift and performance builds. Sourced from Skyline GT-R donors, these engines command premium pricing due to their performance pedigree and limited availability.
commonFailurePoints: Oil pump drive gear failure; turbo bearing wear under high boost
items.cta: Enquire about Nissan Cefiro 2.6L petrol engine availability

items.title: Nissan Cefiro 3.5L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.5L VQ35DE is another popular swap option for A32 owners seeking more power. Sourced from Maxima or 350Z donors, this engine offers strong torque and modern reliability, though ECU and wiring adaptation is required for successful installation.
commonFailurePoints: Oil gallery gasket failure; timing chain guide wear on high mileage
items.cta: Enquire about Nissan Cefiro 3.5L petrol engine availability

keyChanges: A31 chassis introduced with rear-wheel-drive layout
Turbo-charged RB20DET option for performance trims
knownFor: RWD layout makes A31 a drift platform favourite
RB20 engines robust but coil packs fail at 60k-100k miles
RB20DET ceramic turbo wheel prone to fragmentation under hard use
Strong aftermarket support for performance upgrades

faq.h2: Nissan Cefiro Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Nissan Cefiro engine in the UK?
items.answer: Rebuilt Nissan Cefiro engine prices typically range from £900-£1,800 for RB20 units and £1,000-£2,700 for VQ V6 engines, depending on variant, engine code and whether supply-only or supply & fit is selected.
keyPoints: Used RB20 engines start around £800 supply-only
Rebuilt RB20DET turbo units range £1,400-£2,500
VQ30DE rebuilt engines cost £1,300-£2,700 typically
Supply & fit adds £400-£800 to engine price
All rebuilt units include minimum 12-month warranty
items.cta: Compare Nissan Cefiro engine replacement prices for your variant

items.question: What engines can I swap into a Nissan Cefiro A31?
items.answer: The RWD A31 Cefiro accepts RB20E, RB20DE, RB20DET, RB25DE, RB25DET and RB26DETT engines with varying levels of modification; wiring and ECU compatibility must be verified for each swap.
keyPoints: RB20/25 series from Skyline R32/R33 are direct bolt-in options
RB26DETT requires custom mounts and upgraded cooling
ECU and wiring loom must match transmission type
Drift builds often upgrade to RB25DET or RB26 for power
Specialist fitting recommended for complex swaps
items.cta: Get quotes for RB25 or RB26 Nissan Cefiro A31 swap engines

items.question: Why is my Nissan Cefiro RB20 engine misfiring?
items.answer: Misfires on RB20 engines are most commonly caused by failed ignition coil packs, which degrade internally and cause random cylinder misfires, especially under load or boost.
keyPoints: Coil pack failure is the dominant RB20 misfire cause
Symptoms include rough idle, loss of power, check engine light
Replacement coil packs cost £50-£120 each plus labour
Upgraded coils recommended to prevent repeat failure
If misfire caused detonation, engine rebuild may be needed
items.cta: Compare rebuilt RB20 Nissan Cefiro engine prices with upgraded coils

items.question: Is the Nissan Cefiro VQ engine reliable?
items.answer: VQ engines in the A32 Cefiro are generally reliable with proper maintenance, but timing chain guide wear and oil consumption on VQ25DE are well-documented issues on higher-mileage examples.
keyPoints: Timing chain guides become brittle after 90k-130k miles
VQ25DE oil consumption from piston ring wear is common
Regular oil changes critical to VQ longevity
Rebuilt VQ engines include upgraded timing components
12-month warranty covers replacement unit reliability
items.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt VQ Nissan Cefiro engine with timing upgrade

items.question: Can I put a Skyline RB engine in my Nissan Cefiro?
items.answer: Yes, RB20 and RB25 engines from R32/R33 Skyline models are largely compatible with A31 Cefiro chassis, though wiring, ECU and transmission matching must be carefully planned.
keyPoints: RB20DE/DET from Skyline bolt into A31 with minimal modification
ECU and wiring loom must match engine and transmission
RB25DET offers significant power upgrade over RB20
Custom mounts required for RB26DETT GT-R engine
Specialist fitting recommended for complex swaps
items.cta: Compare RB25DET Nissan Cefiro swap engine prices UK

items.question: What causes Nissan Cefiro RB20DET turbo failure?
items.answer: RB20DET turbo failure is typically caused by the factory ceramic compressor wheel fragmenting under hard driving or oil starvation, sending debris into the engine.
keyPoints: Ceramic turbo wheel is brittle and prone to fragmentation
Oil starvation or hard driving accelerates failure risk
Failed turbo often causes piston/valve damage internally
Steel-wheel turbo upgrade recommended on rebuild
Rebuilt RB20DET with upgraded turbo costs £1,400-£2,500
items.cta: Get quotes for RB20DET Nissan Cefiro engine with steel turbo upgrade

items.question: How long should a Nissan Cefiro engine last?
items.answer: With proper maintenance, RB20 and VQ engines can reach 150k-200k miles, but coil packs (RB20) and timing components (VQ) often require attention well before the engine block wears out.
keyPoints: RB20 coil packs typically fail at 60k-100k miles
VQ timing chain guides wear at 90k-130k miles
Regular oil changes and cooling system maintenance critical
Rebuilt engines with upgraded components extend service life
12-month warranty provides peace of mind on replacement
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Nissan Cefiro engine prices with upgraded components

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine in my Nissan Cefiro?
items.answer: For clean A31 drift builds or well-maintained A32 luxury models, engine replacement is often cost-effective versus selling; for rusty or neglected examples, parting out may offer better value.
keyPoints: A31 drift cars retain strong enthusiast demand
Rebuilt RB20 costs £900-£1,800 versus £1,500-£3,000 car value
A32 Excimo models justify VQ30DE replacement investment
Rust, suspension condition and interior state affect decision
Get multiple quotes before committing to replacement
items.cta: Get instant quotes for your Nissan Cefiro engine replacement

items.question: What warranty comes with a replacement Nissan Cefiro engine?
items.answer: Rebuilt and reconditioned Nissan Cefiro engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty; used engines typically carry 3-6 month coverage.
keyPoints: Rebuilt units: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard
Used engines: 3-6 month warranty typical, varies by supplier
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Always confirm exact terms with chosen supplier before purchase
Supply & fit packages often include labour warranty extension
items.cta: Compare Nissan Cefiro engine warranty terms from UK specialists

items.question: How do I find the engine code on my Nissan Cefiro?
items.answer: The engine code is stamped on the engine block near the cylinder head, and also appears on the vehicle identification plate and DVLA records when you enter your registration.
keyPoints: RB20 codes stamped on block near exhaust manifold
VQ codes located on front timing cover area
DVLA lookup via registration confirms factory fitment
Engine code determines compatible replacement options
Enter reg above for instant code identification and quotes
items.cta: Get quotes for your exact Nissan Cefiro engine code replacement
